title: The Lion In Love
content:
Though the Lion in love let them draw
    All his teeth, and pare down every claw,
    He'd no bride for his pains,
    For they beat out his brains
    Ere he set on his maiden a paw.

    Our Very Means May Defeat Our Ends
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Lion In Love"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
